# Burak Satar

> Research Scientist at Singapore Management University (SMU), Singapore. PhD in Computer Science from Nanyang Technological University (NTU), 2024, supported by the A*STAR SINGA scholarship. Research focus: making vision-language models (VLMs) culturally aware, starting with Southeast Asia; multimodal reasoning across image, video, audio and text; text-to-video retrieval; benchmark and dataset construction.

Key facts:
- Current role: Research Scientist, School of Computing and Information Systems, SMU (since March 2025), working with Prof. Chong-Wah Ngo.
- Flagship work: "Seeing Culture: A Benchmark for Visual Reasoning and Grounding" (EMNLP 2025 Main Conference), with a public dataset on HuggingFace.
- Awards: Joint 3rd place, EPIC-Kitchens Multi-Instance Retrieval Challenge at CVPR 2022; Three Minute Thesis finalist at NTU 2022; ENNS student travel award 2018.
- Open to: research collaboration on culturally-aware VLMs and Southeast Asia benchmarks, student internships and mentorship at SMU, industry talks and projects.
- Contact: buraks@smu.edu.sg, or book a meeting at https://buraksatar.github.io/meeting/

- [About and publications](https://buraksatar.github.io/): bio, news, full publication list

- [News](https://buraksatar.github.io/news/): dated timeline since 2018
- [Book a meeting](https://buraksatar.github.io/meeting/): 30-minute slots via Calendly
